issues.description: Target scope incorrect: should be {FILM} type Leader or Character only, not all own characters. Current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' has no type filter.
Second effect (GiveDon) is completely unrelated to card text. Card text contains no Don mechanic. This appears to be erroneous data.

Missing conditional effect: 'If that card is a Character, that Character cannot be K.O.'d during this turn' is not represented in DSL. Requires second effect with condition checking if target is Character type, then preventing KO during turn.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for power boost, but the protection effect should have duration 'DuringYourTurn' (cannot be KO'd during this turn).
